topic: umami food and wine bitterness or acidity perception
trigger_keywords: vino se perciba más amargo o ácido

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A wine is tasted with food that is high in umami.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The sensory contrast can reduce the wine's perceived fruit and softness while making structural elements more prominent.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine may seem more bitter, acidic, drying, or alcoholic than it does without the umami-rich food.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine may seem more bitter, acidic, drying, or alcoholic than it does without the umami-rich food.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
